content.summary: Full build session for AINowGuide.com. PHP/JSON flat-file architecture, dark teal UI design system, channel and session data models, admin panel, and GitHub Actions deployment.
content.description: This is the session that built AI Now Guide from the ground up. Starting from a blank repo, we built the complete PHP/JSON stack: config, router, schema, admin content system, all 8 channels, sample sessions, and the homepage. The design system uses a teal/aqua dark premium aesthetic modeled on the best-in-portfolio sites (krisada.com for directory structure, leveragebuilder.com for modular architecture).
content.build_notes: Architecture: modular PHP includes (config, functions, router, schema, admin-content, database, github-sync). Data: flat JSON files per channel and session. CSS: custom teal design system adapted from LeverageBuilder dark theme.

seo.meta_title: Building AINowGuide.com from Scratch | Build Log | AI Now Guide
seo.meta_description: Full build session for AINowGuide.com: PHP/JSON flat-file architecture, dark teal UI, channel and session data models, and GitHub Actions deployment.
